{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Monarch's ancient script
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Monarch's ancient script]] can contain complex symbols with specific colors.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
